nodes.name: Get Team ID Map from Cache

parameters.query: SELECT external_id, id::text as internal_id FROM wcic.teams WHERE external_id IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO wcic.matches (
  external_id, home_team_id, away_team_id, stage, scheduled_at,
  status, home_score, away_score, home_score_ht, away_score_ht,
  referee, source_api, last_sync_at, raw_payload
) VALUES (
  $1, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, $4::wcic.match_stage, $5::timestamptz,
  $6::wcic.match_status, $7, $8, $9, $10,
  $11, $12, NOW(), $13::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (external_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status         = EXCLUDED.status,
  home_score     = EXCLUDED.home_score,
  away_score     = EXCLUDED.away_score,
  home_score_ht  = EXCLUDED.home_score_ht,
  away_score_ht  = EXCLUDED.away_score_ht,
  referee        = EXCLUDED.referee,
  source_api     = EXCLUDED.source_api,
  last_sync_at   = NOW(),
  raw_payload    = EXCLUDED.raw_payload,
  updated_at     = NOW()
WHERE
  wcic.matches.status         IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.status       OR
  wcic.matches.home_score     IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.home_score   OR
  wcic.matches.away_score     IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.away_score   OR
  wcic.matches.home_score_ht  IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.home_score_ht OR
  wcic.matches.away_score_ht  IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.away_score_ht
RETURNING id::text, external_id, status, home_score, away_score;

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $('Detect Changes').item.json.status, home_score: $('Detect Changes').item.json.home_score, away_score: $('Detect Changes').item.json.away_score, home_score_ht: $('Detect Changes').item.json.home_score_ht, away_score_ht: $('Detect Changes').item.json.away_score_ht }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ match_id: $('Upsert Match').item.json.id, external_id: $json.external_id, status: $('Upsert Match').item.json.status, home_score: $('Upsert Match').item.json.home_score, away_score: $('Upsert Match').item.json.away_score, correlation_id: $('Detect Changes').item.json.correlationId, ts: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wcic.workflow_logs (
  execution_id, workflow_name, status, started_at,
  finished_at, duration_ms, trigger_type, correlation_id,
  items_processed, output_summary
) VALUES (
  $1, 'WF-01-match-collector', 'success', $2::timestamptz,
  NOW(),
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - $2::timestamptz)) * 1000,
  'cron', $3::uuid,
  $4,
  $5::jsonb
);

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $('Init').first().json.executionId,
  $('Init').first().json.startedAt,
  $('Init').first().json.correlationId,
  $('Prepare Matches for Batch').all().length,
  JSON.stringify({ source_api: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.sourceApi, total_matches: $('Normalize Payload').first().json.totalMatches })
] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wcic.workflow_logs (
  execution_id, workflow_name, status, started_at,
  finished_at, duration_ms, trigger_type, correlation_id,
  error_message
) VALUES (
  $1, 'WF-01-match-collector', 'error', $2::timestamptz,
  NOW(),
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - $2::timestamptz)) * 1000,
  'cron', $3::uuid,
  $4
);

main.node: Get Team ID Map from Cache
